[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1101111111 9
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0000000000 a
5 0001101001 4
6 0101101011 6
7 0000001101 3
